risk_free_rate.description: Annualized risk-free rate used for Sharpe and Sortino ratio calculations.
risk_free_rate.title: Risk Free Rate

BacktestRunHistoryItemResponse.description:
History item for backtest runs. The ``summary`` field does not exist on the
ORM model; this schema requires manual construction in the service layer
(see BacktestService._to_history_item). Do not use from_attributes.
BacktestRunHistoryItemResponse.title: BacktestRunHistoryItemResponse

max_holding_days.description: Maximum holding period in trading days (weekdays only). 30 trading days ≈ 6 calendar weeks.
max_holding_days.title: Max Holding Days

profit_target_pct.description: Close position when unrealized profit reaches this percentage of capital at risk. None disables.
profit_target_pct.title: Profit Target Pct

slippage_pct.description: Slippage percentage applied to entry and exit prices.
slippage_pct.title: Slippage Pct

stop_loss_pct.description: Close position when unrealized loss reaches this percentage of capital at risk. None disables.
stop_loss_pct.title: Stop Loss Pct

strategy_overrides.description: Optional overrides for strike placement and spread width

CurrentUserResponse.description:
Response schema for the authenticated user endpoint.

``features`` and ``usage`` are computed fields that do not correspond to
database columns on the User model.  Callers must construct this response
explicitly (see ``BacktestService.to_current_user_response``) rather than
passing an ORM User object directly — ``from_attributes`` is enabled only
for the flat scalar fields inherited from the User row.
CurrentUserResponse.title: CurrentUserResponse

CustomLegDefinition.description: User-defined leg for custom N-leg strategies.

strike_offset.description: Strike offset from ATM in listed-strike steps. 0=ATM, +1=one OTM call step, -1=one OTM put step.
strike_offset.title: Strike Offset

CustomLegDefinition.title: CustomLegDefinition

DailyPickForecast.description: Known keys produced by the forecaster for daily pick forecasts.
DailyPickForecast.title: DailyPickForecast

DailyPickSummary.description: Known keys produced by the backtest engine for daily pick summaries.
DailyPickSummary.title: DailyPickSummary

probabilistic_note.default: This range is probabilistic, derived from historical analog setups, and is not financial advice or a certainty of future results.
probabilistic_note.title: Probabilistic Note

analog_dates.description: Up to 5 representative analog dates (subset of all analogs used).
analog_dates.title: Analog Dates

analog_dates_shown.description: Number of analog dates included in analog_dates (max 5).
analog_dates_shown.title: Analog Dates Shown

analog_dates_total.description: Total number of analogs used in the forecast calculation.
analog_dates_total.title: Analog Dates Total

LandscapeCell.description:
Metrics use float (not Decimal) because they are read from JSONB storage.
PostgreSQL JSONB does not preserve Decimal; values arrive as floats.
BacktestSummaryResponse uses Decimal for API responses; this schema reflects DB shape.
LandscapeCell.title: LandscapeCell

RunStatus.description:
Status enum for backtest runs. Unlike JobStatus, this excludes
``expired`` which only applies to export jobs.
RunStatus.title: RunStatus

SpreadWidthConfig.description: Configuration for how wide a spread's wings are.
SpreadWidthConfig.title: SpreadWidthConfig

SpreadWidthMode.description: How to determine the width of a spread (distance between short and long strikes).
SpreadWidthMode.title: SpreadWidthMode

StrategyOverrides.description:
Optional overrides for how a strategy selects strikes and widths.

Named fields correspond to standard leg roles. Strategies ignore fields
that don't apply to them (e.g., a long call ignores ``short_call_strike``).

long_call_strike.description: Override long call placement (for diagonals, PMCC)

spread_width.description: Override wing/spread width for strategies with protection legs

StrategyOverrides.title: StrategyOverrides

StrikeSelection.description: Configuration for where a strategy leg's strike is placed relative to the underlying.

value.description: Interpretation depends on mode: pct_from_spot → percentage, atm_offset_steps → integer steps, delta_target → absolute delta (0-100).
value.title: Value

StrikeSelection.title: StrikeSelection

StrikeSelectionMode.description: How to choose a strike for a strategy leg.
StrikeSelectionMode.title: StrikeSelectionMode

TemplateConfig-Input.description: The reusable portion of a backtest configuration — everything except symbol and dates.
TemplateConfig-Input.title: TemplateConfig

TemplateConfig-Output.description: The reusable portion of a backtest configuration — everything except symbol and dates.
TemplateConfig-Output.title: TemplateConfig

TradeJsonResponse.description:
Trade response model for JSON-serialized trades (scan/sweep recommendations).

Unlike ``BacktestTradeResponse``, this model does NOT require ``id`` because
trades stored as JSON blobs inside recommendation rows have no individual
database primary key.
TradeJsonResponse.title: TradeJsonResponse

WebhookResponse.description: Typed response for the Stripe webhook endpoint.
WebhookResponse.title: WebhookResponse

info.description: BacktestForecast API — options backtesting, scanning, forecasting, and portfolio analysis.
info.title: BacktestForecast API

delete.description:
Delete the current user's account and all associated data.

Requires the ``X-Confirm-Delete: permanently-delete-my-account`` header
to prevent accidental deletions. This is a destructive, irreversible
operation. Cascade deletes handle child records via ON DELETE CASCADE.

Also cancels any active Stripe subscription and deletes the Stripe
customer object to stop billing immediately.

422.description: Validation error — request payload did not match the expected schema.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded. See Retry-After header.

get.description:
Export all user data for GDPR data portability.

Returns a paginated JSON object. Each section is capped at ``limit``
rows (default 1000). Use ``offset`` to page through large datasets.

schema.title: Response Export Account Data V1 Account Me Export Get
